positive: A highly stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic woodland scene. Central composition featuring stylized, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and intricately rendered fern leaves forming a vibrant, abstract canopy. The foreground has clean, distinct silhouettes of fox silhouettes resting amongst glowing root structures. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with Pacific Northwest tattoo flash aesthetic. Composition: Symmetrical, circular mandala design suitable for apparel print. Lighting: Deep emerald and sapphire blue night glow with brilliant neon pink and gold accents on the flora. Color Direction: High contrast, limited palette emphasizing glowing contrast against deep indigo backgrounds. Print details: Vector art quality, crisp lines, solid color blocks, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, signature, watermark, logo, text, grainy, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, messy, photography, realistic, abstract concept
